svg.text: Best run AL-20260331-017 reached 1.3429 val_bpb. 146 scored runs are tracked here, with 32 kept and 114 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260401-080 (discard) tested sharing may be a reallocation mechanism rather than a direct quality win by itself.
